name: dev-flow-skills
description: Governed development-flow skills for AI coding agents with independent CR, read-only Loop Engineering triage, and approved scheduler automation management.

interface.shortDescription: Governed dev-flow with CR, loop triage, and scheduler
interface.longDescription: Use Dev Flow Skills to route development requests by intent, then guide debugging, UI/UX work, review, clarification, formal planning documents, task orchestration, continuous execution, Git safety, final acceptance evidence, independent post-acceptance CR, read-only Loop Engineering triage/control, and approved cron/heartbeat scheduler management.
defaultPrompt: Use dev-flow to route and handle this development request.
Run a governed dev-flow for this project change.
Use dev-flow to debug this failure and verify the fix.
Use dev-flow-cr to review the current diff after acceptance.
Use dev-flow-triage to build a read-only candidate inbox.
Use dev-flow-loop to review Loop Engineering safety before automation.
Use dev-flow-scheduler to create or manage an approved read-only automation.
